第200章 《刑事罪行條例》

第IV部
恐嚇

24.禁止某些恐嚇作為

任何人威脅其他人 ——
(a)會使該其他人的人身、名譽或財產遭受損害 ；或
(b)會使第三者的人身、名譽或財產遭受損害，或使任何死者的名譽或遺產遭受損害；或
(c)會作出任何違法作為，

而在任何上述情況下意圖 ——
(i)使受威脅者或其他人受驚；或
(ii)導致受威脅者或其他人作出他在法律上並非必須作出的作為；或
(iii)導致受威脅者或其他人不作出他在法律上有權作出的作為，即屬犯罪。

(將1920年第13號第2條編入)
有冇文筆好既巴絲幫手

CAP 200 CRIMES ORDINANCE

Section 10 Offences

(1)Any person who—
(a)does or attempts to do, or makes any preparation to do, or conspires with any person to do, any act with a seditious intention; or
(b)utters any seditious words; or
(c)prints, publishes, sells, offers for sale, distributes, displays or reproduces any seditious publication; or
(d)imports any seditious publication, unless he has no reason to believe that it is seditious,
shall be guilty of an offence and shall be liable for a first offence to a fine of $5,000 and to imprisonment for 2 years, and for a subsequent offence to imprisonment for 3 years; and any seditious publication shall be forfeited to the Crown. (13 of 1938 s. 4 incorporated. Amended 22 of 1950 Schedule; 30 of 1970 s. 3)

(2)Any person who without lawful excuse has in his possession any seditious publication shall be guilty of an offence and shall be liable for a first offence to a fine of $2,000 and to imprisonment for 1 year, and for a subsequent offence to imprisonment for 2 years; and such publication shall be forfeited to the Crown. (13 of 1938 s. 4 incorporated. Amended 22 of 1950 Schedule)

(3)Where any person has been convicted of an offence under subsection (1) or (2) in respect of any seditious publication, the court may order the seizure and forfeiture of any copies of the seditious publication in the possession of—
(a)the person convicted; or
(b)any other person named in the order, if the court is satisfied by evidence on oath that the copies are in the possession of the other person for the use of the person convicted. (60 of 1971 s. 19 incorporated) [cf. 1819 c. 8 ss. 1 & 2 U.K.]

(4)Any copies seized under subsection (3) shall be disposed of as the court may direct; but no copies shall be destroyed until the expiration of the period within which an appeal may be lodged or, if an appeal is lodged, until the appeal has been finally determined or abandoned. (60 of 1971 s. 19 incorporated)

(5)In this section—
“ seditious publication ” ( 煽動刊物 ) means a publication having a seditious intention;
“ seditious words ” ( 煽動文字 ) means words having a seditious intention. (13 of 1938 s. 2 incorporated)

第212章 《侵害人身罪條例》

5.串謀或唆使謀殺

任何人在香港境內串謀、同謀及議同謀殺他人，以及在香港境內唆使、鼓勵、勸說、試圖勸說或建議別人謀殺他人，不論其謀殺對象屬何種國籍或具有何種公民身分或在任何地方，均屬犯罪，可處終身監禁。

(由1911年第30號第2及5條修訂；由1983年第64號第4條修訂；由1999年第13號第3條修訂)
[比照 1861 c. 100 s. 4 U.K.]

［一人一信］
本組織呼籲支持者一人一信向香港律師會投訴近日何君堯於集會上鼓吹及煽動殺人言論一事，希望貴會能夠盡快就何君堯之不當言論展開調查。本組織將提供電郵範文，希望支持者能夠去信至以下電郵地址：complaints@hklawsoc.org.hk

同時，何君堯擁有英國及威爾斯和新加坡的執業律師資格，本組織將會盡快去信，希望相關機構能夠盡快就何君堯之無恥言論進行調查。

以下為電郵範文：

致 香港律師會執業操守部副總監嚴慧雯小姐,

本人發現近日網上流傳一段貴會前會長及前任理事何君堯先生，於本年度九月十七日舉行的集會上，公然發表鼓吹及煽動殺人言論，故特意致函貴會，要求展開正式調查。

於集會上，何君堯先生多次響應台上曾樹和先生的口號，指對抱持香港獨立政見者「殺無赦」(1)，而其後面對記者訪問時，明確指出對於支持香港獨立人士「唔殺左佢做咩呀」(2)，其言論已構成支持並煽動針對政見作出謀殺甚至屠殺行為。

作為執業律師，何君堯先生的上述言論明顯違反《律師執業守則》。根據《律師執業守則》第2(d)條，「任何律師在執業為律師的過程中，不得作出或准許他人代為作出危及或損害或相當可能危及或損害他的個人名譽或作為律師專業的名譽」。何君堯先生當眾發表具煽動性及鼓吹暴力之言論，其專業操守值得質疑。

本人認為，何君堯先生作為執業律師公開發表上述言論，嚴重損害香港法律界的專業形象，亦有可能構成公眾恐慌。本人要求貴會重新審視何君堯先生的執業資格，以釋公眾疑慮。

(1)https://youtu.be/74NgQ3if4Mw
(01:25-end)
(2)https://youtu.be/xIU-yJnfh7o
(01:24-01:50)

熱心香港市民
二零一七年九月十八日

Dear whom who may concern,

This letter is regarding a formal complaint against one of the member of the Law Society, Junius Ho Kwan-Yiu, a partner in HO K.C. and Fong in Hong Kong, regarding a possible violation of core principles and the code of ethics of membership.

On 17th September 2017, the complainee attend a public event of Anti-Hong Kong Independence Movement in Tamar Park, Hong Kong. During the event, Tsang Shu-Wo, one of the holders of the event, gave a politically intimidating speech and said “Those Hong Kong Independence activists must be killed” and the complainee added a statement to end his speech: “without mercy”. Regarding context, the complainee agrees with the intimidating, violent and possibly illegal declaration of Tsang Shu-Wo even he should be acutely aware of the questionable integrity and legality of the speech as a registered solicitor of the Law Society.

The Law Society is an honourable and respectworthy organisation of legal professionals that hold the core principles and the code of ethics as its virtue. I wish a thorough investigation can be organised to find out if the complainee violated the core principles and the code of ethics of the Law Society.

I look forward to your reply and a resolution to this incident.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]

Enclosure.

Send to: report@sra.org.uk

Formal complaint against a member of the Law Society, Junius Ho Kwan-Yiu

To whom it may concern,

This letter is regarding a formal complaint against one of the member of the Law Society, Junius Ho Kwan-Yiu, a partner in HO K.C. and Fong in Hong Kong, regarding a possible violation of core principles and the code of ethics of membership.

On 17th September 2017, the complainee attended a public event of Anti-Hong Kong Independence Movement in Tamar Park, Hong Kong. During the event, Tsang Shu-Wo, one of the holders of the event, gave a politically intimidating speech and said “Those Hong Kong Independence activists must be killed” and the complainee added a statement to end his speech: “without mercy”. Regarding the context, the complainee agrees with the intimidating, violent and possibly illegal declaration of Tsang Shu-Wo even he should be acutely aware of the questionable integrity and legality of the speech as a registered solicitor of the Law Society.

After the event, a reporter asked Dr. Junius Ho on this matter for clarification; and Dr. Ho reiterated that "those (Hong Kong Independence advocates) have undermined the interests of China people, and hence should be killed". This speech has undoubtedly violated the code of practice of a registered solicitor and has aroused public panic and disharmony.

The Law Society is an honorable and respectworthy organization of legal professionals that hold the core principles and the code of ethics as its virtue. I wish a thorough investigation can be organized to find out if the complainee violated the core principles and the code of ethics of the Law Society.

I look forward to your reply and a resolution to this incident.

Yours faithfully,

［NAME］

Enclosure.

Legislative Council Members' Biographies

Dr. Hon Junius HO Kwan-Yiu, JP
http://www.legco.gov.hk/general/english/members/yr16-20/hky.htm

Evidence of the allegations

1.Pro-democracy lawmakers condemn pro-Beijing legislator Junius Ho’s call to ‘kill’ independence advocates
https://goo.gl/c1xi9q

2. Pan-democrats blast Junius Ho for saying independence activists should be ‘killed mercilessly’
https://goo.gl/gg8eBs

3. Video of Junius Ho statement 'kill without mercy'
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TgQgWGVzLOE

英監管局確定何君堯屬「非執業律師」 將跟進有關其操守之投訴
2017年09月27日

公民記者Richard Scotford早前在網上公開一封由英國律師監管局（SRA），回應市民投訴立法會議員何君堯在9月17日集會中不當言行的信件，其後SRA證實何在1997年9月1日註冊為律師，何之後承認沒有在英國執業。Richard Scotford今日再在facebook上載一封SRA相關回信，信中指SRA確認何從來沒有在英國及威爾斯執業，因此何在當地屬非執業律師(non-practising solicitor)，而由於何是當地獲認許的律師(admitted solicitor)，SRA可以考慮跟進有關其操守的投訴(we are able to consider the report you made about his conduct)，並會在10月16日回覆。

SRA沒有在信件中明確表示會作出調查，但Richard Scotford在fb指出，按其理解，投訴已被接納(now accepted)，而SRA會調查何「殺」之言論(investigating Ho's "Kill" comments)。早前本港法律界人士已指出，何如果違反當地律師會對律師專業操守的要求，律師會有權作出調查及處分。
何早前被發現曾在選舉單張宣稱自己是「英國及威爾斯執業律師」，在律師樓網頁及立法會網頁的中文版亦列明自己是「於1997年成為英格蘭及威爾斯執業律師」，後來才鬼祟改成「於1997年獲得英格蘭及威爾斯執業律師資格」。至於英文版本一直只寫「Admitted as a Solicitor in England and Wales in 1997」，故他在電視台節目上解釋，自稱執業律師只是中文繙譯上的錯誤，願意為事件道歉，不過他堅持自己早前在集會中附和對港獨支持者「殺無赦」只是用字不當，沒有為該言論道歉。
翻查資料，何在集會當日其實不單附和「殺無赦」，及後再指「呢啲人(搞港獨者)唔殺咗佢做咩？」之後接受電台訪問時他明言搞港獨是即是戰爭，「戰爭裏面殺敵人有咩問題啊？」
英國《事務律師條例（Solicitorｓ Act）1974》第1條列明執業律師、即以律師身份行事（act as a solicitor）的3項資格，分別是獲認許（admitted）為律師、名字載於律師登記冊、及擁有有效的執業證書；換言之如果何只獲認許而未有申請執業證書，不能自稱執業律師。根據當地《條例》第21條，任何不合資格人士聲稱自己有資格以律師身份行事，即屬刑事罪行。
